text_block_list.text: One day, not long after summer camp...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, didja hear?! Brian's back! And she's
apparently running a scrimmage today.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to waste! Imma warm up around
the perimeter, Teach!

I can't help but smile seeing Hishi Amazon so
excited. However...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Student A
text_block_list.text: Huh? Brian got last place? You've got to be kidding.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Student B
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I'm not. Her running style was completely
different, too.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Student B
text_block_list.text:
I think there's another scrimmage left. Let's go
check it out.

Rumors of Narita Brian's poor health are
circulating like wild.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Student A
text_block_list.text: I hope she's doing okay...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Student B
text_block_list.text:
Well, she just finished recovering, right? I'm sure
this slump of hers won't last long.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Brian!

The scrimmage starts, and the participating
runners leap out of the starting gate.

Narita Brian has positioned herself toward the
rear of the pack and runs calmly, just like she
always used to.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

As the group turns the fourth corner and heads
down the final straight, the crowd watches on
with bated breath...

But the monstrous sprint we're waiting for never
comes. Narita Brian gets stuck behind the pack
and ends up finishing twelfth.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Student A
text_block_list.text:
What's going on with Brian? That was such a
lackluster run. It's like she doesn't have any of the
fire she had before...

It's hard to tell whether Narita Bryan's listening in
on the chatter, as she doesn't react and only
gazes at her feet.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Brian...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Why are you making that face?

Hishi Amazon's hushed question fades into the
cloudy sky.

It's almost curfew. Hishi Amazon hasn't said a
word, and I can't decide if I should speak up or
not.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for actin' like this. I can't return to the dorm
actin' all down in the dumps, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I just can't stop thinkin' about that face she was
making...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
When I saw her standing there, stiff and frozen
with her teeth clenched tight, I just—
Hishi Amazon balls up her fists.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: She must've been so frustrated!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: She never says what's on her mind or shows her feelings! It's like she doesn't want anyone to understand!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But I do. I get her. Right now, she's feeling at her
lowest!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Damn it all!
With a wail, she bursts into tears.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Arrrrgggh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Man, I need to quit with the waterworks! All this
sobbing and sniffling is so not me!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Forget this! I'm gonna go run like I've never run
before! And after I've cleared my head, I'm gonna
call it a day and sleep!

On that note, we quickly head for the field, but
we're not the only ones here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Pant...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Is that Brian with the president?! What are
they...

Narita Brian and Symboli Rudolf are on a partner
run together.

They round the fourth corner and sprint down the
final stretch. Symboli Rudolf is merciless.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch!

The gap between the two grows even wider—their
fight is nothing like the neck-and-neck match
they had seemingly forever ago.
And yet...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Graaah!

Narita Brian dashes towards the finish line with all
her might.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It's fine. I can stand by myself. Sorry for keeping
you, Rudolf.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No need to apologize. I was wanting to go for a
run anyway. I'm more concerned about whether
you were able to find your answer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Maybe. Everything stopped, just like I thought
it would, but...

Narita Brian looks at Symboli Rudolf with an
unwavering gaze.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm running the autumn Tenno Sho. There's no
changing that.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Is that so? I'll be cheering you on, then.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Man...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I've been actin' like an idiot, Teach...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Narita Brian hasn't changed at all.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sure, she's not running like the "Beast" everyone
knows, but before all the races and titles...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: She was just someone with a burning need to run.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Her fire is still burnin' strong as ever!

I think I can see it in Hishi Amazon's eyes too—a
roaring, blinding blaze.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Narita Brian will never give up running!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
She'll get to the top again, even if she has to
crawl there. And she'll be blocking my path to
glory again in no time.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Which means... our goal hasn't changed a bit! Isn't
that right, Teach?!

With rekindled resolve, we're back on track to
tackle the Japan Cup.
